templates.name: Starter Blog
templates.description: A clean, minimal blog with dark mode and search. Perfect for writers, thinkers, and creators who want a beautiful space to share their ideas.

templates.name: Stillwater
templates.description: A dharma center built for the Hudson Valley — meditation courses, events, teacher pages, and a warm non-sectarian community feel.

templates.name: Lantern
templates.description: A dignified personal site for Buddhist teachers and lamas. Biographical pages, teaching archives, upcoming programs, and contact details.

templates.name: Stone Gate
templates.description: Built for monasteries and retreat centers. Share your history, daily schedule, resident teachings, and invite visitors with a serene minimal design.

templates.name: Vermillion
templates.description: Showcase your visual work — thangka, photography, illustration, sculpture. A portfolio template for Tibetan and Buddhist artists and cultural centers.

templates.name: Inkwell
templates.description: For authors, scholars, and publishers. Share books, essays, translations, and research in a clean, literary reading-focused layout.

templates.name: Common Ground
templates.description: A warm, welcoming template for mindfulness centers, NGOs, and community groups. Programs, team pages, blog, and community-focused design.
